name: research
description: v3.2.0 - Parent-proposition creation plus proposition-first R&D protocol with observation/analysis state, derived hypothesis plans, plan review, explanation-first result analysis, and proposition feedback.

interface.shortDescription: Parent-proposition creation and proposition-first R&D protocol
interface.longDescription: v3.2.0 - Agent-driven R&D skills for creating parent propositions before direct solutions and then managing proposition-first research. creating-propositions is the upstream skill for turning material into observations, questions, parent propositions, direct-solution hypothesis slots, expected observations, falsifiers, competing propositions, and conclusion states before prioritization or planning. research remains the formal proposition-first lifecycle owner across the three OECD Frascati Manual 2015 categories: basic_research, applied_research, and experimental_development. The top-level research unit is a proposition, not a standalone plan. Research starts from material such as observations, failures, constraints, comparators, traces, prior-work facts, theoretical tensions, or search/evaluation bottlenecks; analysis then records a contrast, Generated doubt, Working proposition, Expected consequence, observed match/break/missing condition, Proposition status, and only then a derived hypothesis when the status permits one. The project layout stores proposition state under propositions/Pxxx_slug/ with observations.md, analyses.md, decisions.md, and hypotheses/Hxxx_slug/ ledgers. Hypothesis plans live under the derived hypothesis and test one hypothesis traced to the parent proposition and source analysis. Material absence creates a material-acquisition task, not a proposition or hypothesis. Contradicted, under-specified, split-needed, split, and closed proposition states block hypothesis-plan creation until the proposition is revised, split, supplied with more material, routed to children, or closed. Plans retain pre-result commitments including proposition trace, hypothesis type, prediction or expected observation, primary measure, comparator/control when required, evidence route, artifacts, material conditions, Plan visual, and stop/status criteria. research-plan-review remains the plan-path-only pre-execution stop gate for wrong or unsupported premises, invalid validation methods, missing proposition trace, weak Plan visuals, and ungrounded prior-work survey evidence. research-result-analysis remains the plan-path-only post-execution why-analysis skill: it explains how the observed result was produced through result shape, factor decomposition, mechanism traces, interactions, and open explanatory branches. It does not write final claims, state-update inputs, or proposition or hypothesis decisions. quant-research remains the domain extension for time-series validation, leakage checks, multiple-testing risk, and robustness. Reports remain paper-grade evidence artifacts under derived hypotheses with required Related Work, Theory/Formulation, Methods/Conditions, Results/Observations, Ablation/Sensitivity, Discussion, Limitations, and References sections, without next-action or next-hypothesis queues.
defaultPrompt: Create parent propositions from these observations before planning
Design an R&D plan for this investigation
Help me decide what to do after this experimental result
Write a human-readable report from this plan and runs
